body_txt: You watch a movie and something about it just seems off, you don't like it. One night, as you get up for a midnight snack, you open the refrigerator door and the light dawns on you , "This is the real purpose behind this plot!" Because you had that epiphany, what once was a hated moment has become one of your favorites. May be evoked by Rewatch Bonus . Compare Hilarious in Hindsight , Heartwarming in Hindsight , It Makes Sense in Context . See also Ascended Fridge Horror for writers applying prior Fridge Horror in a way analogous to Fridge Brilliance. For the puzzle-solving equivalent, see the Egg of Columbus. Probably has little to do with the light that comes on inside your fridge when you open the door. Beware of unmarked spoilers!
